UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores the user's game progress, including gold, inventory, discovered recipes, and their current deck.

gold.description: The amount of gold the user has.

inventory.description: A map of card IDs to the quantity owned.

discoveredRecipes.description: A list of recipe IDs the user has discovered.

deck.description: A list of card IDs in the user's active deck.

updatedAt.description: The last time the profile was updated.
